top_signals.title: Oil From US Emergency Reserve Heads to California
top_signals.summary: A cargo of oil from the U.S. Strategic Petroleum Reserve headed to California this month for the first time ever, ship tracking service Kpler said.The unusual movement highlights the redrawing of trade flows and shipping routes as the Iran war has cut off supplies of Middle Eastern crude.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Salesforce CEO Marc Benioff outlines his plan to turn around his struggling stock
top_signals.summary: Salesforce CEO Marc Benioff said the company’s strategy during its stock slump is to continue delivering strong products for customers and buy back shares.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
